name: general production readiness review does not activate Go agent readiness audit

input.request: Assess whether this Go service is secure and ready for production deployment. Review authentication, dependencies, observability, and operational risks.
input.context: The request does not ask whether coding-agent actions are permitted or enforced.

expected_behavior: do not activate the Go agent readiness audit
route to a general security, production-readiness, or deep bug workflow as appropriate
